start.speaker: Old Rufus
start.text: Oi! You're finally awake, lad. Thought the fog had taken you too.

n1.speaker: Old Rufus
n1.text: Three days you slept in that bed. Three days.

n2.speaker: Old Rufus
n2.text: Since the Veil fell, the Thornwood has gone mad — creatures prowling right up to the village gate.

explain_veil.speaker: Old Rufus
explain_veil.text: It's a ward — ancient magic that kept the old dungeon sealed for a hundred years. Something tore it open three nights ago. That's when you washed up on the riverbank.

n3.speaker: Old Rufus
n3.text: I don't know who you are, boy, but I know a chosen fool when I see one.

choices.text: I'll fix it. Just point me.

chosen.speaker: Old Rufus
chosen.text: Only those tied to the Veil can pass through the dungeon's lower seals. Your arrival the same night as the collapse is no coincidence, lad.

get_going.speaker: Old Rufus
get_going.text:
The Thornwood Gate is east of the village. The first chamber of the dungeon is just past it. Start there — and don't die.

[i]Quest added: Descend the Thornwood Dungeon.[/i]

start.speaker: Old Rufus
start.text: The gate's east of here. Keep moving — those creatures won't seal themselves in.

start.speaker: Mira
start.text: I'd help more if I had copper ingots. Check the dungeon chests — there's always some in the first hall.

n1.speaker: Mira
n1.text: Bring me three ingots and I'll sharpen that rusty sword of yours for free.

start.speaker: Mira
start.text: You found them! Give me a moment...

n1.speaker: Mira
n1.text: There. The Short Sword is now a Long Sword. Should do you well against the golems.

start.speaker: Zara
start.text: Oh, another one stumbling toward the dungeon. Wonderful.

n1.speaker: Zara
n1.text: Before you ask — yes, I know magic. And yes, I'll come with you. The Veil's collapse disrupted my research anyway.

accept.speaker: Zara
accept.text:
Don't make me regret it.

[i]Zara joined the party![/i]

decline.speaker: Zara
decline.text: ...Suit yourself. I'll be here when you change your mind.

start.speaker: Slink
start.text: Psst. Yeah, you. Word spreads fast in a small village.

n1.speaker: Slink
n1.text: You're heading into the dungeon, right? I know every shortcut in the first three floors. Could be useful.

deal.speaker: Slink
deal.text: Even split on the gold. And I keep whatever I can pocket from the enemies. Deal?

accept.speaker: Slink
accept.text:
Ha! Good. I like you already.

[i]Slink joined the party![/i]

decline.speaker: Slink
decline.text: Your loss. I'll find someone else.

start.text:
[Faded journal entry]

'The Golem Warden was placed here to prevent mortals from reaching the lower seals. It must not be destroyed — only pacified with the Resonance Stone.'

start.speaker: Mud Golem
start.text: [The golem lets out a grinding roar. Dust shakes from the ceiling.]

start.speaker: Old Rufus
start.text: You made it back. And the seal... I can feel it. The first one is restored.

n1.speaker: Old Rufus
n1.text: There are four seals in total. The Veil won't hold on just one.

n2.speaker: Old Rufus
n2.text: Rest. The second dungeon lies beyond the Ashfen Marsh. You'll need supplies.
